root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as loan_payment_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as last_calcint_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.period, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_arrear , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_description, sc_lon_m_loan_card.year_total_interest, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item, sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between '1/10/2019' and '30/9/2020' ) --AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no between '000014' and '000042' ) ) ORDER BY sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ASC, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ASC, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no ASC
